CustomField.formula:
IF( (Need_Postings_For_Others__c = 0 && Need_Postings_For_Self__c = 0 && Need_Responses_For_Others__c = 0 && Need_Responses_For_Self__c = 0 && Offer_Postings_For_Others__c = 0 && Offer_Postings_For_Self__c = 0 && Offer_Responses_For_Others__c = 0 && Offer_Responses_For_Self__c = 0), "",
IF(Give_Take_Count__c <= -50, IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/RedCircle.png","Red Light", 18,18) + " " + TEXT(Give_Take_Count__c), IF(Give_Take_Count__c < 0, IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/YellowCircle.png","Yellow Light", 18,18)+ " " + TEXT(Give_Take_Count__c), IF(Give_Take_Count__c >= 0, IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/GreenCircle.png","Green Light", 18,18)+ " " + TEXT(Give_Take_Count__c), ""))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
The 'Give & Receive Balance' totals up all Posting & Reponses your nieghbourhood has made for themselves and others to help you know if your neghbourhood is giving and receiving in equal measure.
Calucation Process: Need Postings for 'Self' or 'Household' and accepted 'Offer Responses for 'Self' or 'Household' decrease the total (Taking) while all other Post and Response types (Giving) increase the total.
CustomField.label: Give & Receive Balance (Boundary)
